stimulus: Welcome to the experiment. Press Continue to begin.

On the next page, you will see portraits of 8 people and their names.

Your first task is to take a few minutes to memorise the names of these people.

You will have to recall their names during the rest of the experiment, so it is

essential that you try to memorise these people and their names as best as you can.


You will then be tested on your memory of these names and portraits.


The experiment will start after you have completed this memory test.


Ready?

If you have memorised all the portraits and names and are ready to start, press Continue.

Please note: Your memory of these faces will be tested 4 times during this experiment.
You got 8 out of 8 right first time. Press Continue.

In this experiment, you will view photographs of the people from the memory game interacting.

By using the exact phrase given after the photograph appears and recalling the correct names of the people in the photographs, form a sentence describing the interaction. You do not need to capitalise names.

Type your answer in the space provided. Please complete every sentence before moving onto the next trial.

You will only have a few seconds to memorise each given photograph and phrase before you can respond, so try your best to focus.

An example is given below. Press 'Continue' when you are ready.
Before the experiment starts, you will watch two example trials. Press 'Continue'.
Answer: luke is being entertained by dave

Ready to start the experiment?


Remember to describe the picture using a full sentence,

that combines the names of the people with the exact phrase given.

To receive full payment you must do this correctly.

You do not need to capitalise names or use punctuation.
